name: Ed Myer Complex
description: Ed Myer Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Titusville, PA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Meadville Area Rec Complex
description: Meadville Area Rec Complex is a place to play pickleball in Meadville, PA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to water. The courts are free.

name: Meadville YMCA Downtown Y
description: Come play pickleball at Meadville YMCA Downtown Y in Meadville, PA! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Meadville YMCA Vernon Y
description: Meadville YMCA Vernon Y is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Meadville, PA. There is 1 indoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Titusville YMCA
description: Titusville YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Titusville, PA. There are 3 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
fees: Members only — Free for members, $3 for non members
